# AgentTrail

AgentTrail is an open-source SDK for generating cryptographic audit trails for AI agents, enabling compliance with EU AI Act Article 12.

## What it does
- Intercepts every AI agent LLM call
- Generates a tamper-proof receipt: SHA-256 hash chain + Ed25519 signature
- Stores receipts as JSONL in your own infrastructure (local, S3, GCS)
- Provides a CLI tool for auditors to verify chain integrity offline

## Packages
- @aivoralabs/agenttrail — Core SDK
- @aivoralabs/agenttrail-openai — OpenAI SDK wrapper
- @aivoralabs/agenttrail-vercel — Vercel AI SDK middleware
- @aivoralabs/agenttrail-cli — Standalone CLI auditor tool
